title: ai — data retention windows
description: AI conversations retained 1 year rolling for user access + support. AiRun + AiToolCall retained 7 years for audit (regulatory horizon on AI-driven decisions). Embeddings anonymized on source deletion.

policies.description: 1 year rolling from last_message_at. User may explicitly delete anytime. Flagged conversations retained until platform review closes.
7 years for audit — AI-driven decisions must be traceable. Prompts + responses purged from hot at 1 year (only hashes remain in cold).
Co-terminous with parent AiRun. args_hash preserved for tool-abuse forensics.
Embeddings retained while source is live. Hard-deleted when source is purged. No independent purge horizon.
